# MySQL Schema Submodule (Chinese Source)

> English llms.txt for files under `docs/zh/mysql/schema`.

## Docs

- [Schema Overview](../schema.mdx): Root-level topic overview with level-based reading paths for schema design.
- [Schema Design Principles](./design-principles.mdx): Data modeling trade-offs, constraints, schema evolution, and review checklist.
- [Schema Sidebar Metadata](./_meta.json): Navigation metadata for the schema submodule.
- [This LLMs File](./llms.txt): Machine-readable index for this schema directory.
